data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of offering different languages for the tour. While the use case mentions Spanish and English options, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms these language options are effectively implemented or available for bookings. Therefore, this constitutes a gap in fulfilling the requirement for different languages.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of language options for the tour.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify language options availability
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the tour offers both Spanish and English language options.
